titleStmt.title: SII 39.127: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 127. (A.R. No. 127 of 1916.) ETTIYĀTTALI, ARANTANGI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT. AGASTYĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL •••••••••• ŚAKA 1365 (1443 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription refers to the chief mentioned in No. 126 above who remitted the taxes on certain lands, in favour of the temple of Nayiṉār Tiruvagattīśuramuḍaiyār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
satyam cakāttam 1000 3 100 6 10 5- ṉ meṟ cellā niṉṟa Utiro
tkāri varuṣam paṅkūṉi ø 2 10 8 § Aṟantāṅki Aracu Uṭaiyār Aḻakiya maṇavāḷap perumāḷ toṇṭaimā
nayaṉār meṉṉiṉṟa perumāḷ Aticūrarāmat toṇṭaimāṉāṟku nām vaṭaveḷḷāṟāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiya vaḷanāṭṭu
māṅkuṭiyil veḷḷāḻaril Āripiḷḷai pakkal koṇṭa pāci Uṭal rūpāy cu(1/4) makkaṇayiṉā
vyakoṇṭa Avayuḷ Uṭal rūpāy �(1/4) periya perumāḷum piṟavikku nallārum vyakoṇṭa celvaṉ Uṭal rūpāy �(1/4) piṟavikku nallār vyako
ṇṭa poṟkāṭaṉ Uṭal rūpāy �(1/4) Antari Uṭal � rūpāy � metaṉ Uṭal rūpāy cu 1 mun=tiri 2 Āka rūpāy � 1muntiri Iṉṉi
lattukku varum kaṭamai Iṟaiyiliyāka kaḻittuk kuṭuttu veṭṭimuṭṭi Iṉiyokamākkala maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa
camuttapiṟāttikaḷukku nayiṉār tiruvakatticuramuṭaiyāṟku māttāl Añcumarakkāl poṉ kuṭukka kaṟpittu kuṭutta Aḷavukku
Iṉṉilamum periyaperumāḷ piṟavikkunallār Ariyapiḷḷai pāṇṭipperum Āvuṭaiyār vyakoṇṭa maraṅkuḷamuṅ
kiraṅkāl yya In koṇṭa muṉṟum cantirātittavaraikku kāṇiāṭci Ākapaṟṟi Aṉupavittu potakkaṭavārākavum Itukku
Akitam paṇṇiṉavaṉ kaṅkaikaraiyiṟ kapilaiyaiyum brahmaṇa
Uṭaiyār Aruḷicceyaṟpaṭikku nirampavaḻakiyāṉ kāliṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.127 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
